welcomeSubtitle: Start with the site and product decision you need to make. Atlas will turn your inputs into an initial capability model with visible assumptions and gaps.

step1.title: Build your first capability model
step1.desc: Describe the site, products, markets, testing strategy, and demand so Atlas can compile a traceable starting model.

step2.title: See how the Blueprint works
step2.desc: Review the path from product inputs to methods, resources, capacity scenarios, evidence, and expert-reviewed outputs.

step3.title: Use the supporting evidence library
step3.desc: Open workflows, lessons, glossary terms, and focused tools when you need to understand or challenge a model decision.
